title: tilia platyphyllos f. aurea
intro: Tilia platyphyllos f. aurea, also known as the large-leaved lime or golden lime, is a cultivar of the Tilia platyphyllos species, characterized by its golden leaves. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and sedative effects, making it a popular remedy for anxiety and insomnia. The health benefits of Tilia platyphyllos f. aurea include reducing stress and promoting relaxation, as well as alleviating symptoms of allergies and colds. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote a good night's sleep and soothe respiratory issues.
